title: Wang Hao
content:
Wang Lin’s cousin, who bribed his way into being a helper in the 
Heng Yue Sect
's pill division.

Father is 
Wang Tian Shui
’s third brother who has a bad relationship with Wang Lin's dad. Unlike his father, Wang Hao has an amiable relationship with Wang Lin and even secretly gives Wang Lin a few Qi Gathering Pills.
